message:
The other day, I was rummaging through my closet and stumbled upon my old go-bag. You know, the one I packed ages ago and then forgot about? I decided to give it a quick check, and oh boy, was I glad I did! I found some extra snacks, a flashlight, and even a few essential documents that I thought were lost. It felt like finding hidden treasure! 

That little moment reminded me that being prepared doesn’t have to be overwhelming. Sometimes, just taking a few minutes to check in on what you’ve already got can save the day. 

Have you ever had a small win like that? What did you find in your own stash?
